---
title: "TEST"
format: html
editor: visual
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)

foster_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/foster_care_sim_Yampolskaya12.csv")

cannabis_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/cannabis_dreams_siblings_SIM.csv")

irreg_sleep <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/irreg_sleep_wellbeing_simulated.csv")

nutr_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/nutrition_academics_sim_N577_v4.csv")

peer_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/peerpressure_imposter_mh_SIM2.csv")

screen_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/screen_attention_sim_N104.csv")

sleep_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/sleep_insomnia_college_sim_N557.csv")

social_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/social_media_adolescent_sim.csv")

music_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/meaning_music_anx_mem_sim.csv")

trauma_data <- read_csv("https://garberadamc.github.io/PSY150_DATA/data/ptsd_memory_hypnosis_sim.csv")

```
